reviews.comment:
Debe ser la única estación YPF en Miramar y además pertenece al automóvil club argentino (con todos sus beneficios). Generalmente se hacen colas largas y prolongadas para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It must be the only YPF station in Miramar, and it also belongs to the Argentine Automobile Club (with all its benefits). There are usually long lines to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvNzRhNGpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre el lugar está impecable.
El personal es muy amable.
Te ofrecen sus productos y servicios.
Todas las formas de pago.
Tiene una confitería.
No es super rápido, casi siempre hay cola pero vale la pena la espera.

(Translated by Google)
The place is always spotless.

The staff is very friendly.
They offer their products and services.
They accept all forms of payment.
They have a confectionery shop.
It's not super fast; there's almost always a line, but it's worth the wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvOTV1UUpnEAE
